name: bitrouter
description: Cost-optimize your agentic loops: route every model call through the cheapest viable path. Bundles the bitrouter setup skill, ambient daemon status, a live cost feed, and in-session model arbitrage tools.

hooks.command: command -v bitrouter >/dev/null 2>&1 && bitrouter status --agent || echo 'BitRouter CLI not installed — the bitrouter skill can set it up.'

monitors.name: cost-feed
monitors.command: command -v bitrouter >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec bitrouter events --follow || sleep 2147483647
monitors.description: Session spend, failovers, and spend-threshold crossings via BitRouter
